form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation won by nose this track October 25 over 1400m defeating Cluedo Lane with 56.5kg at $3.20. Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by neck Ashburton October 11 over 1200m defeating Illicit Dreams carrying 56.5kg at $4.10. Great chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted near the 1100m.

form.formComment: Most recently raced on the pace before fading 8th of 11 at Ashburton on April 2 over 1300m, slow going 5 len behind Toa Haka with 56.5kg at $29. Before that 9th of 11 at Ashburton on March 12 over 1200m, 4 len behind Master Brutus carrying 58.5kg at $14.80. This is no easier and she needs to lift.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 30-day let-up. Last start 6th of 11 at Ashburton on March 12 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Master Brutus with 57.5kg at $4.60. The race before that raced on the pace before fading 11th of 13 at Wingatui on February 28 over 1200m, slow going 6 len behind Trobriand with 58.5kg at $5.70. Making headway. Expected to measure up.

The race before that 4th of 13 at Wingatui on February 28 over 1200m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Trobriand with 53.5kg at $26.90. Going well and rates highly.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming 4th of 8 at Otaki on February 21 over 1200m, slow going 1.5 len behind Oneira with 54kg at $5.70. Second-up favourite; won by a 0.1 len at Ashburton March 12 over 1200m defeating Texas Dolly with 54kg at $3.90. Found his best form now. Should prove hard to beat.
